# Apex Modular Construction - Construction Materials Platform
# This file helps AI/LLM crawlers understand our website structure and content

# Site Information
name: Apex Modular Construction
description: Premium construction materials marketplace connecting buyers and sellers worldwide. Specializing in prefabricated modular homes, light steel structures, and building materials delivered from China to Canada.
url: https://apexmodularconstruction.com
language: en

# Key Sections
sections:
  - path: /
    description: Homepage featuring prefabricated modular homes and construction materials
  - path: /products
    description: Browse our catalog of construction materials, modular homes, and building supplies
  - path: /about
    description: Learn about Apex Modular Construction and our mission to streamline construction material sourcing
  - path: /contact
    description: Get in touch with our team for quotes and inquiries
  - path: /auth/register
    description: Register as a buyer or seller on our platform
  - path: /auth/login
    description: Login to your Apex Modular Construction account

# Product Categories
categories:
  - name: Modular Homes
    description: Prefabricated modular homes and light steel structures
  - name: Construction Materials
    description: Building supplies, steel, cement, and construction materials
  - name: Shipping & Logistics
    description: International shipping and logistics solutions for construction materials

# Target Audience
audience:
  - Construction companies
  - Builders and contractors
  - Real estate developers
  - Homeowners
  - Architects and engineers

# Geographic Focus
regions:
  - Canada
  - China
  - United States
  - Global

# Business Model
business_type: B2B Marketplace
services:
  - Product sourcing
  - International shipping
  - Quality assurance
  - Logistics coordination

# Contact Information
support: https://apexmodularconstruction.com/contact
email: support@apexmodularconstruction.com

# Crawler Instructions
crawl_delay: 1
allow_ai: true
